knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior_sections + active packet content.

exercises.justification_from_packet: [B2-Skeptic] Niego knowledge externa en S13-T1-A-E1. Instruction: «E1 (guiado) — `norm_name` y `norm_doc`: casefold, colapsar espacios; doc solo [a-z0-9]. Prueba ' Ana QUISPE ' y 'D-12.34'.». Soporte `S13-T1-B-DEMO` (Emparejar 2 registros sintéticos por documento normalizado + bloque región.) → «». Hint: «re.sub para espacios y no alfanuméricos». Huellas en code: `norm_name` + `norm_doc`. Teory heading: «De “RPA & automatización” al Familiarity Evidence Dashboard (mapa)».

exercises.code:
# skeptic/B2: packet-only for S13-T1-A-E2
def blocking_key(rec):
    toks = rec['name'].casefold().split()
    ap = toks[1] if len(toks) >= 2 else toks[0]
    return f"{ap}|{rec['region'].casefold()}"
print(blocking_key({"name": "Luis Huamán Soto", "region": "Cusco"}))
# B2 dual-run (Skeptic): re-validated vs packet S13 S13-T1-A-E2
# skeptic note: refused APIs not in theory/iDo for S13-T1-A-E2
exercises.justification_from_packet: [B2-Skeptic] Gate packet-only para S13-T1-A-E2. Instruction: «E2 (independiente) — `blocking_key(rec)` = primer_apellido|region en casefold. Nombre 'Luis Huamán Soto', region 'Cusco'.». iDo obligatorio `S13-T1-B-DEMO` (Emparejar 2 registros sintéticos por documento normalizado + bloque región.) → «». Hint: «Último token no; usa el segundo token como apellido paterno o el último: documenta. Aquí:…». Solo admito `blocking_key` + `def blocking_key` porque salen del packet. Teory heading: «Normalización, blocking y entity resolution».

exercises.code:
# skeptic/B2: packet-only for S13-T1-B-E2
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]
def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7):
    return [p['id'] for p in pairs if low <= p['score'] <= high]
print(clerical_queue(pairs))
# B2 dual-run (Skeptic): re-validated vs packet S13 S13-T1-B-E2

exercises.code:
# skeptic/B2: packet-only for S13-T2-A-E1
def shared_email(a, b):
    return bool(a and b and a.casefold() == b.casefold())
print(shared_email("Ana@Example.com", "ana@example.com"))
print(shared_email("", ""))
print(shared_email("a@x.com", "b@x.com"))

# skeptic/B2: packet-only for S13-T2-A-E2

    return round(0.6 * (1 if km < 2 else 0) + 0.4 * surname_jaccard, 3)

print(rel_score(5.0, 0.5))

exercises.code:
# skeptic/B2: packet-only for S13-T2-B-E1
txs = [("A","B",10), ("C","D",1), ("B","A",5)]
def direct_txs(txs, a, b):
    out = []
    for x, y, m in txs:
        if {x, y} == {a, b}:
            out.append(m)
    return out
print(direct_txs(txs, "A", "B"))
# B2 dual-run (Skeptic): re-validated vs packet S13 S13-T2-B-E1

exercises.code:
# skeptic/B2: packet-only for S13-T3-A-E2
def uncertainty_band(missing, conflict):
    if conflict or len(missing) >= 2:
        return 'high'
    if missing:
        return 'med'
    return 'low'
print(uncertainty_band([], False))
print(uncertainty_band(["email"], False))
print(uncertainty_band(["email", "phone"], False))
print(uncertainty_band([], True))
# B2 dual-run (Skeptic): re-validated vs packet S13 S13-T3-A-E2
# skeptic note: refused APIs not in theory/iDo for S13-T3-A-E2

Prueba iDo `S13-T3-A-DEMO` (Grafo simple A↔B y contraparte común D → lista RelationshipEvidence.) → «». Hint: «Orden de ifs: conflict primero». Solo admito `uncertainty_band` + `def uncertainty_band` porque salen del packet. Teory heading: «De “RPA & automatización” al Familiarity Evidence Dashboard (mapa)».
